The '''West River''' was one of the two [[river]]s that framed [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], the other being the [[East River]].<ref name="GatORW" />
